notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Joey Bart reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr. Austin Riley to 3rd. Eli White to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Joey Bart reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr. Austin Riley to 3rd. Eli White to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Fernando Tatis Jr. steals (19) 3rd base. Samad Taylor steals (6) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Andujar GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Andujar grounds into a double play, shortstop Ha-Seong Kim to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Jackson Merrill out at 2nd. Miguel Andujar out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Miguel Andujar grounds into a double play, shortstop Ha-Seong Kim to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Jackson Merrill out at 2nd. Miguel Andujar out at 1st.
